title: ANC - 7.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values, and during call User sets ANC to ON
scenario: ANC mode does not become Active with Adaptive selected when toggled ON during a call while both ANC and Transparency are OFF
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Ensure ANC Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
4. Ensure Transparency Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
5. Initiate or join a call using the Poly audio device.
6. During the active call, navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and set it to ON.
7. Observe the ANC and Transparency mode states.
8. End the call and return to the Home screen.
9. Navigate back to Audio Settings and observe the ANC and Transparency mode states.
10. Attempt to toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: 1. ANC mode becomes Active with Adaptive value selected. 2. Transparency remains greyed out and OFF during the call. 3. After leaving the call, ANC stays Active with Adaptive selected. 4. Transparency stays OFF. 5. User can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
